title: Google I/O 2026: 3 things you need to know
summary: Jeff Su analyzes three announcements from Google I/O 2026: Gemini Spark's integration with Gmail, Drive, and Calendar for everyday users; its ease of use compared to Claude Cowork and Codex; and Gemini Omni for video generation. He predicts Omni will eventually enable AI to generate specific screens on demand rather than opening fixed applications.
